title: Market Data Analyst
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Market Data Analyst based in India.This role is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the quality, reliability, and scalability of financial market data used by a large global investment community.
